theme_notes: Touchstones: SCOTUS upholds birthright citizenship and strikes campaign-finance limits (June 30); Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire via SpaceX $75B IPO; Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce plan 1,000-guest MSG wedding; Knicks' record 29-point NBA Finals comeback; Russia's fuel shortages spark gas-station brawls after Ukraine strikes on refineries.
settled: All square. Even the Supreme Court couldn't find a grievance here today.
Nothing owed. SpaceX didn't IPO for this level of boring. Good for you.
Perfectly even. Taylor and Travis aren't this settled. And they're planning a wedding.
youOwe: Less than a World Cup stadium beer. Somehow equally humiliating.
Musk made this mid-sentence after his IPO. You are still composing an apology text.
Putin admitted his country is running out of fuel this week. You're just running out of excuses.
That's a World Cup group-stage jersey. You're not even in the group stage.
Elon Musk became the world's first trillionaire this month. You cannot settle $100. Noted.
The Knicks came back from 29 down in the NBA Finals. You haven't made any comeback at all.
SpaceX raised $75 billion. You owe $300. Same species, different outcomes.
Taylor Swift's MSG wedding has a thousand guests. You have one creditor. Prioritize.
Iran blocked the Strait of Hormuz. You are blocking repayment. Eerily similar dynamic.
Almost a grand. Elon earns this before breakfast. You are not Elon.
World Cup knockout-round ticket money. You've been knocked out for weeks and didn't notice.
SCOTUS freed parties to spend unlimited cash today. You can't even spend what you owe.
Taylor Swift wedding-guest minimum spend territory. You're not making the list.
SpaceX IPO'd at $1.77 trillion. You owe four figures. Both valuations are accurate.
San Antonio was up 29 in the NBA Finals and handed it away. This is your version of that.
That's enough to open a petrol station in Russia. Great time to enter the market, actually.
Elon crossed a trillion. You crossed five figures in the wrong direction. Different journeys.
The World Cup final hasn't happened yet. Your debt has been running since before the group stage.
theyOwe: They owe you pocket change. Russia started fistfights at gas stations over this much.
It's basically nothing. The Knicks were down 29 points. Look how that ended.
Taylor Swift spends this on wedding invitations. You've been patient.
That's World Cup merch money. They bought an alibi instead.
Musk made this between your last two texts. They have no excuse.
Small enough to ignore. Big enough that you're reading this. That's the dynamic.
Iran leveraged the Strait of Hormuz. You have receipts. Use them.
SpaceX didn't IPO at $1.77 trillion so you could eat this in silence.
Taylor and Travis spent this per wedding guest. Your partner can't square $400. Noted.
Almost a grand outstanding. The NBA Finals had less suspense than your text thread.
Putin admitted fuel shortages on camera. At least someone's acknowledging the problem.
Three Supreme Court rulings dropped today and none got your money back. File separately.
That's SpaceX IPO-afterparty territory. You're not on the guest list, but you're owed.
Down 29, the Knicks found a way back. Your partner can't find their Venmo app.
You're owed enough to crash Taylor Swift's MSG wedding and bring a plus-one.
World Cup hospitality suite, flights included. What you're actually getting: a text.
Musk hit a trillion. You're owed five figures. Relativity has never been crueler.
SCOTUS upheld birthright citizenship today. Your right to this money predates that ruling.
